topic: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous)

drills.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I ate rice yesterday.
sentences.hindi: मैंने कल चावल खाया।
sentences.pronunciation: i ate rice yesterday

sentences.english: I was eating food when he came.
sentences.hindi: जब वह आया, मैं खाना खा रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: i was eating food when he came

sentences.english: I had eaten food before he came.
sentences.hindi: उसके आने से पहले मैं खाना खा चुका था।
sentences.pronunciation: i had eaten food before he came

drills.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: I had been studying for an hour.
sentences.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से पढ़ रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: i had been studying for an hour

sentences.english: She went to school last year.
sentences.hindi: वह पिछले साल स्कूल गई थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she went to school last year

sentences.english: She was working when I arrived.
sentences.hindi: जब मैं आया, वह काम कर रही थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she was working when i arrived

drills.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: She had finished her work before I arrived.
sentences.hindi: मेरे पहुँचने से पहले उसने काम खत्म कर लिया था।
sentences.pronunciation: she had finished her work before i arrived

sentences.english: She had been working for two hours.
sentences.hindi: वह दो घंटे से काम कर रही थी।
sentences.pronunciation: she had been working for two hours

sentences.english: They went to school yesterday.
sentences.hindi: वे कल स्कूल गए।
sentences.pronunciation: they went to school yesterday

drills.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: They were playing when I called.
sentences.hindi: जब मैंने फोन किया, वे खेल रहे थे।
sentences.pronunciation: they were playing when i called

sentences.english: They had done their homework before I told them.
sentences.hindi: मेरे बताने से पहले उन्होंने homework कर लिया था।
sentences.pronunciation: they had done their homework before i told them

sentences.english: They had been playing since morning.
sentences.hindi: वे सुबह से खेल रहे थे।
sentences.pronunciation: they had been playing since morning

drills.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: I exercised in the morning.
sentences.hindi: मैंने सुबह exercise की।
sentences.pronunciation: i exercised in the morning

sentences.english: I was reading when you came.
sentences.hindi: जब तुम आए, मैं पढ़ रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: i was reading when you came

sentences.english: I had read this book before you came.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हारे आने से पहले मैंने यह किताब पढ़ ली थी।
sentences.pronunciation: i had read this book before you came

drills.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: I had been reading this book for three hours.
sentences.hindi: मैं तीन घंटे से यह किताब पढ़ रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: i had been reading this book for three hours

sentences.english: He sang a song last week.
sentences.hindi: उसने पिछले हफ्ते एक गाना गाया।
sentences.pronunciation: he sang a song last week

sentences.english: He was singing when I arrived.
sentences.hindi: जब मैं आया, वह गा रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: he was singing when i arrived

drills.title: Tenses Part 2 — Past Tense (Simple, Continuous, Perfect, Perfect Continuous) — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: He had sung a song before I arrived.
sentences.hindi: मेरे आने से पहले उसने गाना गाया था।
sentences.pronunciation: he had sung a song before i arrived

sentences.english: He had been singing for half an hour.
sentences.hindi: वह आधे घंटे से गा रहा था।
sentences.pronunciation: he had been singing for half an hour
